violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to clean and sanitize ice machine before resuming use. Establishment is to send photos of clean and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen and prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit across from the grill. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. All sinks must be supplied with paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Sliced Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen and back prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
Food contact surfaces of ice machine was observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

Cheeses, deli-meats and salads were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023
Some floor tiles in the kitchen/under-next to fryolator area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
